steps.title: Identify the unexpected demand
steps.content: The key signal is “buyers who hadn't previously wanted to purchase old action figures thronged the market”—new demand suddenly appeared. The blank must describe how this happened.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Eliciting” means to draw out or bring forth. Rising prices drew out new demand from buyers who previously had no interest. The other choices fail to capture this emergence of new demand. That matches choice D — D is correct.
